name: Amon G. Carter Jr. Downtown YMCA
description:
Parking Instructions: 
The Downtown Y has two parking lots: one on the North side of the building on 4th St., and an additional one attached to the NW corner of the building that can be accessed from 4th St or Burnett St. 

After parking, bring your license plate # (photo if you don't want to memorize it) to the front desk. 

You'll scan a QR code at the front desk with your camera. It'll take you to a link where you input your license plate # you're protected for 3 hours from ticketing.
